/usr/bin/c++  -O3 -march=native -Wall -Wextra -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/pm_serial.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pm_serial.dir/src/ic_reader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pm_serial.dir/src/cic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pm_serial.dir/src/poisson_fft.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pm_serial.dir/src/gradient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pm_serial.dir/src/force_interp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pm_serial.dir/src/integrator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pm_serial.dir/src/diagnostics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pm_serial.dir/src/output.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pm_serial.dir/src/simulation.cpp.o -o pm_serial  -lfftw3
